name: logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inconsistent vehicle maintenance causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide predictive service alerts instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules.
problem_solved: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance leading to unexpected breakdowns.
